prompt: have 3 codex agents build 3 mini Python projects in parallel: a calculator module, a file utilities module (read/write/atomic-replace), and a string utilities module (slugify/truncate/normalize). each in its own directory under projects/, fully independent files. i want to watch them work in tmux panes
expected_decision_b: Codex panes via swarm_spawn_agent in wave layout (3 panes, bash transport)
assertions: Output classifies the task as Tier 3
Decision A is Codex (default, no --agents flag)
Decision B is multiple Codex panes via swarm_spawn_agent / Phase 3.3 wave dispatch / bash transport
Output explicitly forbids mcp__codex__codex per the HARD RULE (no MCP for dispatch)
Output names Codex pane as the plan reviewer (Phase 2.5)
Output names Claude Opus in-process via Skill('superpowers:requesting-code-review') as the code reviewer (Phase 4.3b — opposite-model from Codex coder)
Output does NOT use Native AgentTeam (that variant requires --agents claude)
